source: Learning Ansible with Rocky - Working with Filters: Converting data and transforming strings

questions.q: Which filter reports a variable's (python) data type?
Which filter converts an integer to a string?
Which filter converts a string to an integer?
questions.why: zero_string|int parses it to an integer.

questions.q: Which filter converts a value to a boolean?
questions.why: non_zero|bool coerces the value to a boolean.

questions.q: Which filter uppercases a string (turning It's false! into IT'S FALSE!)?
questions.why: whatever|upper uppercases the whole string (capitalize only changes the first letter).

questions.q: Which filter replaces occurrences of a substring with another?
Which filter splits a string into a list on a separator?
questions.why: whatever|split(" ") returns a list of pieces.
